evals.prompt: Check if the Card component is consistent with the design system.
evals.expected_output: Should read the component file, check token usage (colors, spacing, typography), component patterns (states, naming, props), and produce a structured report

assertions.text: Reads the component file before checking
Checks token consistency (colors use CSS variables, spacing uses scale)
Reports findings in a structured format

evals.prompt: I want to create a new Tooltip component.
evals.expected_output: Should check existing components for patterns to follow (naming, props structure, states), then propose a consistent component structure

assertions.text: References existing component patterns for consistency
Proposes states: default, hover, focus, active, disabled
Uses consistent naming conventions (PascalCase for components)

evals.prompt: Check the entire homepage for design system consistency.
evals.expected_output: Should check token usage, responsive breakpoints, and accessibility across the page

assertions.text: Identifies any hardcoded values that should be tokens
Waits for confirmation before proposing fixes
